name: Chinese: Shrimp Fried Rice
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Raw shrimp, cleaned and slivered
recipeInstructions:
1. Pan-fry the eggs into thin sheets in a frying pan.
2. Remove and cut into small strips.
3. Heat peanut oil over high heat. Stir-fry shrimp and chicken. When done, sizzle with 1 tsp wine.
4. Add the cooked rice. Stir until well-mixed. Add 1 tbsp soy sauce, 1/4 tsp MSG and diced green onions. Add 1 tsp salt (or more). Stir-fry for at least 10 minutes over medium heat.
5. Add egg strips. Serve hot.
Note: The cooked rice should not be sticky. It might even be better to use day-old rice. If you must use freshly cooked rice, you may spread the rice on a cookie sheet and let cool completely before stir-frying it.
